creator: nakai@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

GNOME is now updated to 1.0.53. 
I think you delete glib-1.2.3 and install glib-1.2.5, 
without recompile of imlib. 
Please delete and reinstall the imlib and try 
the latest gnomelibs. 
When you also have some problem, send-pr again...
